query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(630002, 'Who is traditionally credited with writing the Gospel of Matthew?', 'multiple_choice', '["The apostle Matthew (Levi)", "John Mark", "Luke the physician", "The apostle Peter"]', 'The apostle Matthew (Levi)', 1),
(630002, 'For what audience was Matthew''s Gospel primarily written?', 'multiple_choice', '["Jewish audience", "Roman audience", "Greek audience", "Gentile audience"]', 'Jewish audience', 2),
(630002, 'Which Gospel is the shortest and likely the earliest written?', 'multiple_choice', '["Mark", "Matthew", "Luke", "John"]', 'Mark', 3),
(630002, 'What Greek word does Mark frequently use to emphasize action?', 'multiple_choice', '["Euthys (immediately)", "Logos (word)", "Agape (love)", "Pistis (faith)"]', 'Euthys (immediately)', 4),
(630002, 'How many Old Testament quotations and allusions does Matthew contain approximately?', 'multiple_choice', '["130", "50", "200", "75"]', '130', 5),
(630002, 'Which chapters of Matthew contain the Sermon on the Mount?', 'multiple_choice', '["Chapters 5-7", "Chapters 1-3", "Chapters 10-12", "Chapters 24-25"]', 'Chapters 5-7', 6),
(630002, 'According to Mark 10:45, why did the Son of Man come?', 'multiple_choice', '["To serve and give His life as a ransom", "To establish an earthly kingdom", "To judge the nations", "To teach the Law"]', 'To serve and give His life as a ransom', 7),
(630002, 'What are Matthew, Mark, and Luke called because they share similar content?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Synoptic Gospels", "The Pauline Gospels", "The Johannine Gospels", "The Apostolic Gospels"]', 'The Synoptic Gospels', 8),
(630002, 'To whom does Matthew trace Jesus'' genealogy?', 'multiple_choice', '["Abraham", "Adam", "David only", "Moses"]', 'Abraham', 9),
(630002, 'What does Matthew emphasize about Jesus'' role?', 'multiple_choice', '["Son of David and King of Israel", "Suffering Servant", "Universal Savior", "Divine Logos"]', 'Son of David and King of Israel', 10),
(630002, 'Compare and contrast the emphases of Matthew and Mark regarding Jesus'' identity and mission.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Matthew emphasizes Jesus as the Jewish Messiah and King who fulfills prophecy, while Mark emphasizes Jesus as the suffering Servant who came to serve.', 11);
